Class Contract

java.lang.Object
org.example.oopjavagroupproject.model.Contract
public class Contract extends Object
Represents a contract for a student's accommodation in a room. This class corresponds to a single row in the "contracts" table in the database.

  • Field Details

    • id

      private int id

    • student

      private Student student

    • room

      private Room room

      private LocalDate startDate

    • endDate

    • status

      private String status

  • Constructor Details

    • Contract

      public Contract(int id, Student student, Room room, LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate, String status)
      Constructs a new Contract with a specified ID (for existing contracts).
      Parameters:
      id - The unique identifier of the contract.
      student - The student associated with the contract.
      room - The room associated with the contract.
      startDate - The start date of the contract.
      endDate - The end date of the contract.
      status - The status of the contract (e.g., "Active", "Expired").

    • Contract

      public Contract(Student student, Room room, LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate, String status)
      Constructs a new Contract without a specified ID (for new contracts). The ID is expected to be auto-generated by the database.
      Parameters:
      student - The student associated with the contract.
      room - The room associated with the contract.
      startDate - The start date of the contract.
      endDate - The end date of the contract.
      status - The status of the contract.

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public int getId()
      Returns the contract's unique ID.
      Returns:
      The contract ID.

    • setId

      public void setId(int id)
      Sets the contract's unique ID.
      Parameters:
      id - The new contract ID.

    • getStudent

      public Student getStudent()
      Returns the Student object associated with this contract.
      Returns:
      The student.

    • setStudent

      public void setStudent(Student student)
      Sets the Student object for this contract.
      Parameters:
      student - The new student.

    • getRoom

      public Room getRoom()
      Returns the Room object associated with this contract.
      Returns:
      The room.

    • setRoom

      public void setRoom(Room room)
      Sets the Room object for this contract.
      Parameters:
      room - The new room.

    • getStartDate

      public LocalDate getStartDate()
      Returns the start date of the contract.
      Returns:
      The start date.

    • setStartDate

      public void setStartDate(LocalDate startDate)
      Sets the start date of the contract.
      Parameters:
      startDate - The new start date.

    • getEndDate

      public LocalDate getEndDate()
      Returns the end date of the contract.
      Returns:
      The end date.

    • setEndDate

      public void setEndDate(LocalDate endDate)
      Sets the end date of the contract.
      Parameters:
      endDate - The new end date.

    • getStatus

      public String getStatus()
      Returns the status of the contract.
      Returns:
      The contract status.

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(String status)
      Sets the status of the contract.
      Parameters:
      status - The new contract status.

    • getStudentId

      public int getStudentId()
      A convenience method to get the student ID. Returns 0 if the student is not set.
      Returns:
      The ID of the student, or 0 if null.

    • getRoomId

      public int getRoomId()
      A convenience method to get the room ID. Returns 0 if the room is not set.
      Returns:
      The ID of the room, or 0 if null.
